nodes.title: Fetch Enhanced Log
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-log-enhanced?limit=20 with Authorization header. Returns recent activity log with {entries: [{id, type, description, amount, date, userName}], total}. Aggregates vouchers, journal entries, and warehouse operations.

nodes.title: Fetch Enhanced Stats
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-stats-enhanced?period=month with Authorization header. Supports periods: day, week, month, year, custom. Returns {totalReceipts, totalPayments, netCashFlow, voucherCount, comparison: {previousPeriod, changePercent}}.

nodes.title: Fetch Enhanced Chart
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/widget-chart-enhanced?months=6 with Authorization header. Returns time-series data for charts: {labels: [month names], datasets: [{label, data: [amounts]}]}. Includes receipts, payments, and net flow per month.
